purpose: Repo-local OS Abyss artifact bundle input for generated/eval_report_index.min.json.

consumer_contract.stable_interface: python scripts/validate_abyss_machine_report_index_bundle.py and abyss-machine artifacts trust-gate --artifact-class aoa_evals_generated_report_index_bundle --consumer-intent agent --json
consumer_contract.consumer_expectation: Release consumers select an aoa_evals_generated_report_index_bundle from the registry latest read-model only after ABI, SBOM, SLSA/in-toto verification, and consumer trust-gate allow/warn succeeds; bundle-local eval sources keep proof meaning.

consumer_command: abyss-machine artifacts bundle-register BUNDLE_DIR --registry-dir REGISTRY_DIR --lifecycle-state release-ready --consumer-ref aoa-evals:generated-report-index --source-repo aoa-evals --json

abyss-machine artifacts materialize-subjects BUNDLE_DIR --registry-dir REGISTRY_DIR --manifest mechanics/release-support/parts/artifact-bundles/manifests/report_index.bundle.json --consumer-intent agent --source-repo aoa-evals --json

abyss-machine artifacts trust-gate --registry-dir REGISTRY_DIR --artifact-class aoa_evals_generated_report_index_bundle --consumer-intent agent --source-repo aoa-evals --subject-digest SUBJECT_DIGEST --json
abyss-machine artifacts registry-latest --registry-dir REGISTRY_DIR --artifact-class aoa_evals_generated_report_index_bundle --source-repo aoa-evals --json
